title: Magnetic Space Group Operator Tables
description: Symmetry operators for all 1651 commensurate Shubnikov magnetic space groups (BNS setting). Each operator is a coset representative (W, t, theta) of the MSG acting on fractional coordinates.

groups.description: One entry per magnetic space group, ordered by UNI number

type.description: Shubnikov type: 1=ordinary SG, 2=grey (paramagnetic), 3=BW without lattice translations, 4=BW with antitranslations

parent_sg.description: ITA number of the parent (non-magnetic) space group

operators.description: Complete set of coset representatives forming the group

operator.description: A single (W, t, theta) symmetry operator. Acts on fractional coordinates as x' = W x + t. Magnetic moments transform as m' = theta * det(W) * W m.

t.description: Fractional translation vector (values are rational, stored as float64)

theta.description: Time-reversal factor: +1 unitary (preserves time), -1 antiunitary (reverses time)
